query:
SELECT id, status, startedAt, completedAt, 
  ROUND((UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 - completedAt) / 3600000, 1) AS age_hours
FROM pipelineRuns 
ORDER BY startedAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;

SELECT id, weekEnding, createdAt,
  ROUND((UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 - createdAt) / 3600000, 1) AS age_hours
FROM reports
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 3;
